methodology.joint_simulation: 10,000 shared simulations per player; PTS, REB, and AST use the same historical game-rate vector and simulated minutes
methodology.correlation_policy: combo markets derive from each joint simulation, never independent distribution addition
methodology.matchup_policy: pace/minutes/position adjusted REB and AST context when sample-qualified
methodology.market_policy: lines and prices are comparison inputs only
methodology.missing_data_policy: neutral fallback with explicit data-quality status
methodology.kelly_policy: quarter-Kelly style sizing capped at 1 unit
